title: TruSeq RNA Preparation with Modification for Four Rounds of Poly-A Selection
author: Dr. Daniel Richter
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.imucc6w
materials: Pre-heat the thermal cycler lid to 100ºC
Pop bubbles with a 30 gauge needle

steps.title: Vortex RNA Purification Beads (RPB) to...
steps.instruction: Vortex RNA Purification Beads (RPB) to resuspend Let RNA Purification Beads stand at RT for 30 minutes before using

steps.title: Add 50 µL RPB to RNA
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL RPB to RNA

steps.title: Run the mRNA Denaturation program Program...
steps.instruction: Run the mRNA Denaturation program Program details can be found in the guidelines

steps.title: Remove PCR tubes when the cycler reaches 4ºC
steps.instruction: Remove PCR tubes when the cycler reaches 4ºC

steps.title: Incubate tubes at room temperature (RT)...
steps.instruction: Incubate tubes at room temperature (RT) on the bench for 5 min 00:05:00 This allows the RNA to bind to the beads

steps.title: Place tubes on a magnetic stand...
steps.instruction: Place tubes on a magnetic stand at RT for 5 min This allows seperation of the poly-A RNA beads from the solution

steps.title: Remove and discard the supernatant from each tube
steps.instruction: Remove and discard the supernatant from each tube. Take care not to disturb the beads.

steps.title: Remove tubes from the magnetic stand
steps.instruction: Remove tubes from the magnetic stand

steps.title: Wash beads with Bead Washing Buffer (BWB) undetermined
steps.instruction: Wash beads with Bead Washing Buffer (BWB) undetermined

steps.title: Gently pipette up and down 6 times to mix thoroughly
steps.instruction: Gently pipette up and down 6 times to mix thoroughly

steps.title: Place tubes on a magnetic stand...
steps.instruction: Place tubes on a magnetic stand at RT for 5 min 00:05:00

steps.title: Remove and discard the supernatant from each tube
steps.instruction: Remove and discard the supernatant from each tube. Take care not to disturb the beads. The supernatant contains the majority of the ribosomal and other non-messenger RNA

steps.title: Remove tubes from the magnetic stand
steps.instruction: Remove tubes from the magnetic stand

steps.title: Add Elution Buffer (ELB) to each tube undetermined
steps.instruction: Add Elution Buffer (ELB) to each tube undetermined

steps.title: Gently pipette up and down 6 times to mix thoroughly
steps.instruction: Gently pipette up and down 6 times to mix thoroughly

steps.title: Run the mRNA Elution 1 program...
steps.instruction: Run the mRNA Elution 1 program Program details can be found in the guidelines

steps.title: Remove the tubes from the thermal...
steps.instruction: Remove the tubes from the thermal cycler when it reaches 25ºC

steps.title: Place the tubes on the benchtop at RT
steps.instruction: Place the tubes on the benchtop at RT

steps.title: Add Bead Binding Buffer (BBB) to...
steps.instruction: Add Bead Binding Buffer (BBB) to each tube undetermined This allows mRNA to specifically rebind the beads, while reducing the amoung of rRNA that non-specifically binds.

steps.title: Gently pipette up and down 6 times to mix thoroughly
steps.instruction: Gently pipette up and down 6 times to mix thoroughly

steps.title: Place the tubes on a magnetic...
steps.instruction: Place the tubes on a magnetic stand at RT for 5 min 00:05:00

steps.title: Remove and discard supernatant from each tube
steps.instruction: Remove and discard supernatant from each tube. Take care not to disturb the beads.

steps.title: Remove the tubes from the magnetic stand
steps.instruction: Remove the tubes from the magnetic stand

steps.title: Wash the beads with Bead Washing Buffer (BWB) undetermined
steps.instruction: Wash the beads with Bead Washing Buffer (BWB) undetermined

steps.title: Gently pipette up and down 6 times to mix thoroughly
steps.instruction: Gently pipette up and down 6 times to mix thoroughly

steps.title: Place the tubes on a magnetic...
steps.instruction: Place the tubes on a magnetic stand for 5 min 00:05:00

steps.title: Remove and discard all of the supernatant from each tube
steps.instruction: Remove and discard all of the supernatant from each tube. Take care not to disturb the beads. The supernatant contains residual rRNA and other contaminants, and were released in the first elution and did not rebind the beads.

steps.title: Remove the tubes from the magnetic stand
steps.instruction: Remove the tubes from the magnetic stand

steps.title: If this is the first time through the protocol
steps.instruction: If this is the first time through the protocol: continue to repeat Poly-A Selection.

steps.title: If this is the second time through the protocol
steps.instruction: If this is the second time through the protocol: add Elute, Prime, Fragment Mix (EPF) to each tube undetermined The Elute, Prime, Fragment Mix contains random hexamers for RT priming and serves as the first strand cDNA synthesis reaction buffer.

steps.title: Gently pipette up and down 6...
steps.instruction: Gently pipette up and down 6 times to mix thoroughly The Elute, Prime, Fragment Mix contains random hexamers for RT priming and serves as the first strand cDNA synthesis reaction buffer. After adding 18 uL Elute, Prime, Fragment Mix, continue to Incubate RFP .

steps.title: Add Elution Buffer (ELB) to each tube undetermined
steps.instruction: Add Elution Buffer (ELB) to each tube undetermined

steps.title: Gently pipette up and down 6 times to mix thoroughly
steps.instruction: Gently pipette up and down 6 times to mix thoroughly

steps.title: Pre-heat the thermal cycler to 80ºC...
steps.instruction: Pre-heat the thermal cycler to 80ºC with the program 80ºC Program details can be found in the guidelines

steps.title: Incubate the tubes for 2 min at 80ºC 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Incubate the tubes for 2 min at 80ºC 00:02:00

steps.title: Immediately transfer the tubes to the...
steps.instruction: Immediately transfer the tubes to the magnetic stand This prevents mRNA from re-binding to the beads

steps.title: Transfer supernatant to a new set...
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant to a new set of tubes immediately after the beads have aggregated on the magnetic stand undetermined

steps.title: Repeat the entire protocol from step...
steps.instruction: Repeat the entire protocol from step 2 (Purify and Fragment mRNA - Make RBP / Vortex RNA Purification Beads to resuspend) to step 35 (Purify and Fragment mRNA - Make RFP / Add Elute, Prime, Fragment Mix)

steps.title: Pre-heat the thermal cycler lid to...
steps.instruction: Pre-heat the thermal cycler lid to 100ºC This is the step from which to continue after the second time through the Poly-A Selection protocol.

steps.title: Run the program Elution 2 -...
steps.instruction: Run the program Elution 2 - Frag - Prime Program details can be found in the guidelines

steps.title: Remove the tubes from the thermal...
steps.instruction: Remove the tubes from the thermal cycler when it reaches 4ºC and centrifuge briefly Proceed immediately to Synthesize First Stand cDNA

steps.title: Place the tubes on the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Place the tubes on the magnetic stand at RT for 5 min 00:05:00

steps.title: Transfer supernatant (fragmented and primed mRNA) to new tubes undetermined
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant (fragmented and primed mRNA) to new tubes undetermined

steps.title: Add First Strand Master Mix (FSM)/SuperScript...
steps.instruction: Add First Strand Master Mix (FSM)/SuperScript II to each tube undetermined First Strand Master Mix (FSM)/SuperScript II is stored at -20C, thawed at RT Second Strand Master Mix (SSM) is stored at -20 C, thawed at RT

steps.title: Gently pipette up and down 6 times to mix thoroughly
steps.instruction: Gently pipette up and down 6 times to mix thoroughly

steps.title: Return the First Strand Master Mix/SuperScript...
steps.instruction: Return the First Strand Master Mix/SuperScript II tube back to -20ºC immediately after use

steps.title: Run the first strand program Program...
steps.instruction: Run the first strand program Program details can be found in the guidelines

steps.title: When the thermal cycler reaches 4ºC,...
steps.instruction: When the thermal cycler reaches 4ºC, remove the tubes and proceed immediately to Synthesize Second Strand cDNA.

steps.title: Add thawed Second Strand Master Mix...
steps.instruction: Add thawed Second Strand Master Mix (SSM) to each tube undetermined Second Strand Master Mix (SSM) is stored at -20 C, thawed at RT

steps.title: Gently pipette up and down 6 times to mix thoroughly
steps.instruction: Gently pipette up and down 6 times to mix thoroughly

steps.title: Pre-heat the thermal cycler to 16ºC...
steps.instruction: Pre-heat the thermal cycler to 16ºC with the second strand program Program details can be found in the guidelines

steps.title: Incubate the tubes at 16ºC for 1 hr 01:00:00
steps.instruction: Incubate the tubes at 16ºC for 1 hr 01:00:00

steps.title: Remove the tubes from the thermal...
steps.instruction: Remove the tubes from the thermal cycler and let stand to bring to RT

steps.title: Vortex the AMPure XP beads until...
steps.instruction: Vortex the AMPure XP beads until they are well dispersed AMPure XP beads are stored at 4C, let stand at RT for 30 minutes before use

steps.title: Add 90 µL beads to each...
steps.instruction: Add 90 µL beads to each tube containing 50 µL ds cDNA

steps.title: Gently pipette the entire volume up...
steps.instruction: Gently pipette the entire volume up and down 10 times to mix thoroughly

steps.title: Incubate the tubes at RT for 15 min 00:15:00
steps.instruction: Incubate the tubes at RT for 15 min 00:15:00

steps.title: Place the tubes on the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Place the tubes on the magnetic stand at RT for 5 min 00:05:00

steps.title: Remove and discard 135 µL supernatant from each tube
steps.instruction: Remove and discard 135 µL supernatant from each tube. Take care not to disturb the beads.

steps.title: With the tubes remaining on the...
steps.instruction: With the tubes remaining on the magnetic stand, add 80% EtOH to each tube without disturbing the beads. undetermined

steps.title: Incubate tubes at RT for 30 sec 00:00:30
steps.instruction: Incubate tubes at RT for 30 sec 00:00:30

steps.title: Remove and discard the supernatant from...
steps.instruction: Remove and discard the supernatant from each tube without disturbing the beads

steps.title: Repeat steps 66-68 for a total...
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 66-68 for a total of two 80% EtOH washes

steps.title: Let the tubes stand at RT...
steps.instruction: Let the tubes stand at RT for 15 min to dry 00:15:00

steps.title: Remove them from the magnetic stand
steps.instruction: Remove them from the magnetic stand

steps.title: Add Resuspension Buffer (RSB) to each tube undetermined
steps.instruction: Add Resuspension Buffer (RSB) to each tube undetermined

steps.title: Gently pipette the entire volume up...
steps.instruction: Gently pipette the entire volume up and down 10 times to mix thoroughly

steps.title: Incubate the tubes at RT for 2 min 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Incubate the tubes at RT for 2 min 00:02:00

steps.title: Place the tubes on the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Place the tubes on the magnetic stand at RT for 5 min 00:05:00

steps.title: Transfer 60 µL supernatant (ds cDNA)...
steps.instruction: Transfer 60 µL supernatant (ds cDNA) to a new set of tubes This is a safe stopping point for storage at -20 degrees C

steps.title: Add End Repair Mix (ERP) to...
steps.instruction: Add End Repair Mix (ERP) to each tube undetermined End Repair Mix (ERP) is stored at -20 C, thawed at RT

steps.title: Adjust the pipette to 100 µL...
steps.instruction: Adjust the pipette to 100 µL and gently pipette the entire volume up and down 10 times to mix thoroughly

steps.title: Pre-heat the thermal cycler to 30ºC...
steps.instruction: Pre-heat the thermal cycler to 30ºC with the End Repair program Program details can be found in the guidelines

steps.title: Incubate the tubes at 30ºC for 30 min 00:30:00
steps.instruction: Incubate the tubes at 30ºC for 30 min 00:30:00

steps.instruction: Remove the tubes from the thermal cycler

steps.instruction: Add 160 µL beads to each tube containing 100 µL of sample

steps.title: Adjust the pipette to 200 µL...
steps.instruction: Adjust the pipette to 200 µL and gently pipette up and down 10 times to mix thoroughly

steps.title: Incubate the tubes at RT for 15 min 00:15:00
steps.instruction: Incubate the tubes at RT for 15 min 00:15:00

steps.title: Place the tubes on the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Place the tubes on the magnetic stand at RT for 5 min or until liquid appears clear

steps.title: Repeat step 87 once

steps.title: Repeat steps 154-170 once
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 154-170 once. During the repeated steps, modify step 166 to add 31 ul Resuspension Buffer (RSB) and step 170 to transfer 30 ul to separate 1.5 ml Eppendorf tubes.

steps.title: Take one aliquot for Qubit and...
steps.instruction: Take one aliquot for Qubit and one aliquot for qPCR in 1.5 mL tubes undetermined

steps.title: Freeze cleaned PCR and both aliquot tubes at -20ºC
steps.instruction: Freeze cleaned PCR and both aliquot tubes at -20ºC

steps.title: Make Qubit working solution in a 1
steps.instruction: Make Qubit working solution in a 1.5 mL Eppendorf tube by mixing 7 µL Qubit dsDNA HS reagent (the fluorescent label) with 1393 µL Qubit dsDNA HS buffer, and mix well. undetermined, enough for 5 libraries and 2 standards

steps.title: Prepare standard 1 and standard 2...
steps.instruction: Prepare standard 1 and standard 2 by mixing 10 µL of each standard with 190 µL working solution in seperate Qubit assay tubes

steps.title: Add 1 µL of each library...
steps.instruction: Add 1 µL of each library to 199 µL working solution in seperate Qubit assay tubes (1:200 dilution)

steps.title: Mix all tubes by vortexing for 2-3 sec
steps.instruction: Mix all tubes by vortexing for 2-3 sec

steps.title: Incubate tubes at RT for 2 min 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Incubate tubes at RT for 2 min 00:02:00

steps.title: Read standards 1 and 2 on the Qubit 2
steps.instruction: Read standards 1 and 2 on the Qubit 2.0 Fluorometer

steps.title: Read all library samples on the...
steps.instruction: Read all library samples on the fluorometer and record their concentration (in ng/mL)

steps.title: Dilute 1 µL aliquots of each...
steps.instruction: Dilute 1 µL aliquots of each library in seperate tubes to 300 pg/µL Determine the appropriate dilution to achieve this concentration by dividing the Qubit concentration by 1.5. For example, if the Qubit concentration is 152 ng/mL, then the library should be diluted at 1:101 (=152/1.5) for 300 pg/uL.

steps.title: Allow the gel-dye mix to equilibriate...
steps.instruction: Allow the gel-dye mix to equilibriate to RT for 30 min before use 00:30:00 If gel-dye mix is not already prepared, allow the HS DNA dye concentrate (blue) and the HS DNA gel matrix (red) to equilibrate to RT for 30 minutes, add 15 uL of HS DNA dye concentrate to a HS DNA gel matrix vial, vortex well, spin down and transfer to a spin filter. Centrifuge at 2240 xg +/- 20% for 10 minutes and discard the filter.

steps.title: Clean the Bioanalyzer electrodes by pipetting...
steps.instruction: Clean the Bioanalyzer electrodes by pipetting 350 µL nuclease-free water into a cleaning chip and placing it into the machine

steps.title: Ensure that the chip priming station...
steps.instruction: Ensure that the chip priming station syringe clip is at the lowest position, that the base plate is in position C, and that the plunger is positioned at 1 mL.

steps.title: Pipette gel-dye mix in the well...
steps.instruction: Pipette gel-dye mix in the well at the third row and last column undetermined

steps.title: Put the chip on the priming...
steps.instruction: Put the chip on the priming station and close it firmly until it locks into position

steps.title: Press the plunger until it is...
steps.instruction: Press the plunger until it is held by the clip, wait exactly 1 minute, and release the clip. 00:01:00

steps.title: Wait for at least 5 sec...
steps.instruction: Wait for at least 5 sec and slowly pull back the plunger to the 1 mL position

steps.title: Open the priming station and remove the chip
steps.instruction: Open the priming station and remove the chip

steps.title: Pipette gel dye mix in the...
steps.instruction: Pipette gel dye mix in the remaining 3 wells of the last column undetermined

steps.title: Pipette marker (green) in all sample and ladder wells undetermined
steps.instruction: Pipette marker (green) in all sample and ladder wells undetermined

steps.title: Pipette HS DNA ladder (yellow) in...
steps.instruction: Pipette HS DNA ladder (yellow) in the well marked with a ladder (third column, last row) undetermined

steps.title: Pipette diluted 300 pg/µL library aliquot into wells 1-11 undetermined
steps.instruction: Pipette diluted 300 pg/µL library aliquot into wells 1-11 undetermined

steps.title: Add marker (green) into each unused well undetermined
steps.instruction: Add marker (green) into each unused well undetermined

steps.title: Move to the chip vortexer and...
steps.instruction: Move to the chip vortexer and vortex for 1 min at 2400 rpm 00:01:00

steps.title: While vortexing, remove the cleaning chip...
steps.instruction: While vortexing, remove the cleaning chip and leave the Bioanalyzer open to dry the electrodes

steps.title: Run the chip in the Agilent...
steps.instruction: Run the chip in the Agilent 2100 Bioanalyzer within 5 min (to avoid evaporation).

steps.title: Gently pipette up and down 6 times to mix thoroughly
steps.instruction: Gently pipette up and down 6 times to mix thoroughly

steps.title: Incubate the tubes at room temperature for 5 minutes 00:05:00
